title: director
subtitle: AI Film Director Console
pitch: Keep novels, scripts, characters, locations, storyboards, voice and video inside one directing flow. Styles, assets, task states, and outputs stay aligned in a single console.

style.label: Style Asset
style.title: Style Stays Consistent
style.description: Turn visual style from a one-off input into a reusable asset that can be managed and referenced across the pipeline.

run.label: Run Console
run.title: Tasks Stay Visible
run.description: Generation, retries, failures, and recovery states stay visible in one workspace instead of getting lost between steps.

episode.label: Episode Flow
episode.title: Episode-Driven Flow
episode.description: Episodes and stages are organized from a director's point of view, so users always know what part of the production they are advancing.

showcase.styleDescription: Blue-white contrast, mirrored materials, cold stage lighting.
showcase.storyboardDescription: Characters, camera direction, and scene style are aligned in the same frame.
showcase.noteDescription: Characters, scenes, storyboards, and video prompts can resolve from one source of style truth.

features.title: Unleash Infinite Creativity
features.subtitle: Full-process AI assistance, from script to final cut

character.title: Character Workshop
character.description: Create unique anime characters with high consistency

storyboard.title: Smart Storyboard
storyboard.description: One-click text to storyboard, precise narrative control

world.title: World Building
world.description: Immersive scene generation to build grand story backgrounds
